description_long: This is a large, walled bungalow residence with a white exterior and a red-tiled driveway leading to a covered carport. The main building features two stories, with multiple rectangular windows and a prominent front entrance. The property is enclosed by a solid boundary wall, with a main gate and a smaller pedestrian gate visible at the front. There is a landscaped garden area with trees and shrubs, as well as a gazebo structure in the backyard. The roof is a combination of flat and gently sloped sections, and the overall layout is spacious, with ample open areas for parking and recreation. The architectural style is modern with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A spacious, modern two-story bungalow with a white facade, red-tiled driveway, carport, and landscaped garden, all enclosed by a boundary wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, carport, and boundary wall with gates and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, backyard gazebo, and the length of the boundary wall.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, carport roof, and minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side elevation, garden area, and gazebo structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
